title: Debating the quality of NTE again
display_title: Debating the quality of NTE again
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Nov 18, 2014 1:01 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Film came out in Japan exactly two years ago today.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Nov 18, 2014 3:45 am Yeah, it must had been something crazy, I didn't joined EGF yet (hell, I wasn't in Evangelion yet back then) but after reading the old thread, it was quite the crazy party between the revelation of the timeskip, Shinji being a criminal, WILLE, all mixed with the crazy fake reports such as Asuka being the last Angel that Kaworu and Shinji have to kill or that Mari is a LAS baby from the future/alternative universe that always calls Asuka "Mama"! The server must had felt that frenzy too, since just the first reports of what was at the end of Q's TV airing crashed the server under the number of logs, I can't even begin to imagine what it was when it was Q proper that was discussed and what it'll be when Shin Eva will finally be released, or hell, just when we'll get an actual new trailer!

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Nov 18, 2014 8:56 am ElMariachi wrote: Yeah, it must had been something crazy, I didn't joined EGF yet (hell, I wasn't in Evangelion yet back then) but after reading the old thread, it was quite the crazy party between the revelation of the timeskip, Shinji being a criminal, WILLE, all mixed with the crazy fake reports such as Asuka being the last Angel that Kaworu and Shinji have to kill or that Mari is a LAS baby from the future/alternative universe that always calls Asuka "Mama"! The server must had felt that frenzy too, since just the first reports of what was at the end of Q's TV airing crashed the server under the number of logs, I can't even begin to imagine what it was when it was Q proper that was discussed and what it'll be when Shin Eva will finally be released, or hell, just when we'll get an actual new trailer!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Nov 18, 2014 11:15 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: That was a fun, fun time. I still remember how excited I was when I was watching the first seven minutes of the film on Youtube.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Nov 18, 2014 1:16 pm @ElMariachi: If you're curious, you can go to the stats page and check to see the amount of new users or posts per month that we got around the times of every major film release or announcement.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Nov 18, 2014 10:12 pm Those were fun times on the forum. When news came over about what was going on in 1.0 & 2.0 it all made immediate sense as a redoing of Evangelion. But 3.0... man, when those first bits of news about what the movie came out - 14 year time skip, Evangelion 13, 4th Impact, piano - for a day or two there I was positive the whole thing was one prank pulled off by one ingenious Japanese fanboy giving the rest of the world false info. Then pics from the theatrical booklet came out & my mind was blown! (Best Rebuild yet) My favorite wonky bit of news/speculation to come out those first few days - Mari is "confirmed" as Asuka & Shinji's time-traveling daughter from the future.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 18, 2014 11:29 pm My favorites were Rei being pregnant (from Eva-01 , apparently? Wasn't Shinji! ) and Mari being BOTH a combination of Asuka/Shinji's daughter and Yui. Can't find the batshit insane chart (from some 4chan thread, I'd wager), but if anybody does, please post it! I'm still hoping to stay spoiler-free until a proper theatrical release for FINAL stateside, but we'll see. I can read FINAL's Anal Devastation thread after the fact and get a good laugh over the false information then. For future reference folks, unless it's on http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/ or the Japanese wikipedia page , don't believe it. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Nov 19, 2014 1:16 am I saw just enough of the Q spoilers back then to feel legitimately spoiled without having run across anything outlandish enough to throw the rest into doubt. What I remember seeing was a description of Shinji waking up on the moon base, something about Asuka and Mari pestering him with questions about his family, and of course, the part about Asuka being the final Angel. I remember one summary ending with Rei going with Gendo to start (the real) Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Nov 19, 2014 4:18 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: @ElMariachi: If you're curious, you can go to the stats page and check to see the amount of new users or posts per month that we got around the times of every major film release or announcement.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Nov 24, 2014 6:58 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: You do understand when big news about Rebuild hits the forums, the tons of duplicate threads that are created by fans who don't know realize where to post naturally get locked or merged, right? It was extremely hard to keep things organized when 2.0 hit, even with just trailers!

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Nov 24, 2014 7:02 am Not being a member when 2.0 was out was a good thing judging by the threads I've read.....

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Nov 24, 2014 8:30 am Dima wrote: Yeah, i am aware of that. To tell you the truth, i wasn't a member when 2.0 hit. I joined around the theatrical release of Q and while i avoided most of the sections in case of spoilers, i think the situation was under control in terms of ''new info = 5 different threads''.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Nov 24, 2014 9:34 am Oh Boy I can't wait to see what happens when we get a new trailer!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Nov 24, 2014 11:58 am Rosenakahara wrote: Not being a member when 2.0 was out was a good thing judging by the threads I've read.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Nov 24, 2014 12:00 pm Rosenakahara wrote: Not being a member when 2.0 was out was a good thing judging by the threads I've read.....

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Nov 24, 2014 12:03 pm Hell no i love 2.0! i like 3.0 just a tiny bit more but i don't understand the hate 2.0 gets.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Nov 24, 2014 12:03 pm I prefer Q to Ha, but the tone in the first half of Ha is very welcoming and lighthearted. The action scenes were nice too, and it honestly did do an impressive job juggling the important plot threads and character arcs given its running-time. Likewise, I don’t understand the hate that film got. I guess a lot of people were just impatient to get to the deconstructive latter half of an Anno Eva that they forgot the first half establishing what needed deconstruction needed to be there as well. The fact that a lot of Eva fans saw Q and exclaimed “Finally! This is ‘true’ Eva!” seems to support this idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 24, 2014 1:19 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Likewise, I don't understand the hate that film got. I guess a lot of people were just impatient to get to the deconstructive latter half

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Nov 24, 2014 1:33 pm ^ Link isn't working for me. Also why in the world 2.0 gets so much hate. I wasn't aware of it at first and when i found out i was surprised. It's one of the best anime films ever made and the best Eva thing ever created. I honestly don't have any problem re-watch it like 20 times and i still won't be bored (i have re-watch it like 4 or 5 times until now).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 24, 2014 1:54 pm Link fixed by dropping the "Debate-the-quality-of-Rebuild-here-1/" bit.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Nov 18, 2014 3:45 am Yeah, it must had been something crazy, I didn't joined EGF yet (hell, I wasn't in Evangelion yet back then) but after reading the old thread, it was quit
